name: lint-spec
description: Run deterministic spec lint checks and explain actionable findings.
instructions: Run deterministic lint before semantic review.
Explain findings by severity and lifecycle gate.

Treat missing requirement-level MoSCoW priority as compatible by default. When priority diagnostics exist, explain canonical values as must-have, should-have, and could-have, and route won't-have wording to non-goals, out-of-scope text, rejected decisions, or routed residuals.
Keep waivers visible with their recorded reasons.
client_support_recovery: Use MCP lint_spec_package or lint_doc when available. If MCP tools are unavailable, inspect the package or changed document directly and reserve spec_runtime.py lint for explicit no-MCP recovery.
